detail: Built dependency DAG from sections-v1.json; added integrator pseudo-node depends_on sections 1-4; section-5 depends_on integrator. Linear chain -> 6 single-node waves.
Wave 1. Decomposed into 1 builder (b1-location). Produced location.js — geolocation auto-detect + visible manual entry + Nominatim geocoding, yields {lat,lon,label,source}.
node --check pass; acceptance assertions S1.A1-A5 verified; contracts section-1--section-2/3/4 verified. Section marked verified.
Wave 2. Decomposed into 1 builder (b2-storelookup). Produced storelookup.js — Overpass query (shop=alcohol/wine/beverages, around filter), normalization, graceful error/empty handling.
node --check pass; acceptance assertions S2.A1-A5 verified; contracts section-1/2--section-3/4 verified. Section marked verified.
Wave 3. Decomposed into 1 builder (b3-presentation). Produced presentation.js — haversine distance, closest selection, result card, external directions links, empty/error states.
node --check pass; acceptance assertions S3.A1-A5 verified; contracts section-1/2/3--section-4 verified. Section marked verified.
Wave 4. Decomposed into 1 builder (b4-shell). Produced shell.html/shell.css/shell.js — self-contained shell, flow orchestration, loading/status/error states, radius widening, startup guard.
node --check pass; acceptance assertions S4.A1-A4 verified; contracts section-1/2/3--section-4 verified. Section marked verified.

Assembled sections 1-4 into single-file output/integration/index.html — CSS inlined in <style>, shell skeleton + 4 module scripts inlined in dependency order. Resolved init-order, naming, and asset seams. Wrote manifest.json. integrator pseudo-node marked verified.

Wave 6. Exercised all 11 edge_case_testing assertions against the integrated artifact under production fidelity. 11/11 pass. Two inline deviations logged (dev-001 offline-message harness artifact, dev-002 sandbox Overpass 406). Wrote ect-1/report.json. Section marked verified.
All sections verified, integrator verified, edge-case testing executed. Wrote build-complete.json. Next: critic_final_sweep, convergence_verifier, delivery_to_final_directory, run_report.
